input.complaint: I sent 5000 taka to a wrong number around 2pm today. Please refund my money.

output.agent_summary: Ticket TKT-001 (wrong_transfer, severity=high). Customer references TXN-9101 (amount=5000.0, counterparty=+8801719876543). Evidence verdict: consistent. Customer note: "I sent 5000 taka to a wrong number around 2pm today. Please refund my money."
output.recommended_next_action: Verify TXN-9101 details with the customer, then route to dispute_resolution for receiver-side recovery attempt per standard policy.
output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. We have noted your concern about transaction TXN-9101. We understand you may have sent money to the wrong recipient. We have shared the details with our dispute_resolution team. If the amount is eligible, it will be returned only through official channels. For your safety, please do not share your PIN, OTP, password, or full card number with anyone — including someone claiming to be from our team.

input.complaint: Someone called me and asked for my OTP and PIN to verify my account. Is this real?

output.agent_summary: Ticket TKT-002 (phishing_or_social_engineering, severity=critical). Evidence verdict: insufficient_data. Customer note: "Someone called me and asked for my OTP and PIN to verify my account. Is this real?"
output.recommended_next_action: Mark this ticket as fraud-risk. Do not engage the customer on credentials. Escalate to the fraud_risk queue and follow the standard phishing playbook.
output.customer_reply: Thank you for letting us know. We take this seriously. Please continue only through our official support channels. Our team will never ask for these details. We will only contact you through our official support channels. For your safety, please do not share your PIN, OTP, password, or full card number with anyone — including someone claiming to be from our team.

input.complaint: Payment failed but 1200 taka was deducted from my account.

output.agent_summary: Ticket TKT-003 (payment_failed, severity=medium). Customer references TXN-7710 (amount=1200.0, counterparty=merchant_acme). Evidence verdict: consistent. Customer note: "Payment failed but 1200 taka was deducted from my account."

output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. We have noted your concern about transaction TXN-7710. We are checking your transaction status with our payments team. If a deduction is confirmed without a corresponding successful payment, the amount will be returned only through official channels. For your safety, please do not share your PIN, OTP, password, or full card number with anyone — including someone claiming to be from our team.
